# orxtra event

Event firing commands.

## event fire

Fire a named event for wait-for tasks.

### Flags

| Name | Short | Type | Default | Env | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--payload` |  | str |  |  | JSON payload. |

### Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `event_name` | yes | Event name. |
| `run_id` | yes | Run ID. |
